item.title: Ace Salary Negotiation 💬 • Know your market value with research. • Highlight achievements, not tasks. • Use: “I increased efficiency by 20%.” • Don't settle for the first offer. • Practice negotiation scenarios. How can you better prepare for your next salary negotiation? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Ace Salary Negotiation 💬 • Know your market value with research. • Highlight achievements, not tasks. • Use: “I increased efficiency by 20%.” • Don't settle for the first offer. • Practice negotiation scenarios. How can you better prepare for your next salary negotiation? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
